text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin comes out on top at the<n>Japanese
Derby, but she collapses<n>from sheer exhaustion
after the fierce<n>race.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket and Biwa Hayahide<n>visit her
afterward and are relieved to<n>see that she's okay.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They each declare their intent to win<n>the final race
in the Triple Crown<n>tour—the Kikuka Sho—and
depart from<n>the room.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket and Biwa Hayahide's
overwhelming determination leaves<n>Narita Taishin
in awe.
